programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Det største eventyr af alle begynder med Star Trek, den utrolige historie om en ung besætnings jomfrurejse om bord på et at de mest avancerede stjerneskibe, der nogensinde er bygget: U.S.S. Enterprise.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Det frygtløse hold bag Ghost Adventures er tilbage! I hver episode rejser spøgelsesjægerne Zak Bagans og Aaron Goodwin sammen med teknikerne Billy Tolley og Jay Wasley til en hjemsøgt destination, hvor de mødes med lokale, øjenvidner og eksperter for at undersøge spøgelseshistorierne fra hvert sted. Ved hjælp af den nyeste, videnskabelige teknologi og gadgets sætter holdet deres efterforskning i gang om natten, hvor de konfronterer den paranormale aktivitet og dokumenterer beviserne i håbet om at afdække sandheden bag hvert af de hjemsøgende mysterier.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Hårdføre fiskere på Beringhavet er mænd af sjælden støbning – de har eventyr i blodet og fisker efter krabber med en potentiel gevinst på 100 millioner dollars.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: Mandskabet på Enterprise vender hjem og opdager, at en person fra deres egen organisation har sprængt flåden og alt det, den står for, i luften og efterladt verden i en kritisk tilstand.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Det er blevet tid til at gense den modige besætning på U.S.S. Enterprise. I stjernetågen bliver Enterprise angrebet af en sværm af små skibe, som sammen tvinger Enterprise på flugt, svært beskadiget, og med store dele af besætningen taget til fange. Enterprise styrter ned på samme planet og bliver smadret, hvilket tvinger Kaptajn Kirk og de resterende besætningsmedlemmer til at forsøge at befri deres kammerater.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman og hans kammerater risikerede alt i Sydamerika og tabte. I stedet for at grave guld og diamanter op, har mændene på det fremmede kontinent kun oplevet bitre tilbageslag og skuffelser. Vover vovehalsene i Alaskas vildmark at starte forfra, eller er drømmen om berømmelse og rigdom væk for altid?

programme.desc: The Last Alaskans følger fire familier som har valgt å leve svært isolert. De må overvinne tøffe arktiske forhold, frustrerende tilbakeslag og aggressive dyr, og hver dag er en kamp i en av de siste store, uberørte villmarkene på planeten.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Bli med til en helt unik dyrehage der Jurgen og de sprøe gorillavennene hans viser oss en skjult verden med snakkende dyr. Fra skilpadder som beatboxer til menneskelige pingviner, vegetarløver og bittesmå, spinnville aper, alt går an i dyrehagen.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Marty, Matt og Misty Raney hjelper mennesker som bor på værharde og utsatte steder.

programme.title: Big Fish Man
programme.desc: Jakub Vagner er på jakt etter en fisk som er født til å drepe. Målet er fisken Hydrocynus goliath, og han drar oppover en av verdens farligste elver for å fange den.

programme.title: Animal Cribs
programme.desc: Antonio, prosjektlederen Grace og hans høyre hånd bulldog Chewie, omdanner områder til funksjonelle, romslige rom for både kjæledyr og folkene de elsker.

programme.desc: Pitbulltreneren Tia Maria Torres fortsetter å utfordre misoppfatningene som er forbundet med pitbuller i Villalobos Rescue Centre.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Dorothy og Travis katt kaster opp i sinne og angriper dem. De er redd sønnen deres blir det neste offeret. Jackson må ta i bruk all sin erfaring for å ta seg av denne katten.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Du vil ikke tro dine egne øyne når du ser de forseggjorte, luksuriøse bassengene bygget av Lucas Congdon og hans kreative team.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Dyktige etterforskere bruker ny teknologi for å analysere bevis fra mange års Bigfoot-observasjoner for å finne ut hvor og når de har størst sjanse til å få et glimt av denne mystiske skapningen.

programme.title: Extinct Or Alive
programme.desc: Med en dyp lidenskap for og kunnskap om alle dyr, floker dyrelivsbiolog Forrest Galante seg sammen med avsidesliggende og noen ganger farlige miljøer for å spore og bringe tilbake til livet skapninger som feilaktig er merket som utdødde.

programme.desc: Her får du høre virkelige historier om dyr som tar over folks hjem. Fra kakerlakker og rotter til bjørner som bryter seg inn - dette er gjester du ikke så lett blir kvitt.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: One of the most famous bibliographic references of all time, George Bradshaws Guide to the Continental Railway, serves as the guidebook for this documentary series. A total of five episodes will showcase the different European routes covered in this guide, published in 1913, which marked a turning point for British tourists during the Edwardian era. Gleaming cosmopolitan cities, alpine landscapes, warm, sparkling seas, and picturesque villages are some of the places Bradshaw describes in his book, known precisely for sparking an interest among English citizens in the exoticism of foreign travel.

programme.title: Inside Our Minds
programme.desc: Inside Our Autistic Minds follows the journey of autistic individuals as they collaborate with filmmakers, animators, designers, and musicians to create powerful short films that express their inner experiences. Guided by Chris, the project helps them communicate thoughts and emotions they’ve struggled to share, offering their families and friends a deeper understanding of their world—and revealing the rich, complex lives often hidden beneath the surface.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle journeys across the globe to meet individuals who have abandoned the pressures of modern life in favor of simpler, more self-sufficient living. Along the way, he explores their unique lifestyles, the challenges they face, and the freedoms they’ve discovered by stepping away from the conventional rat race.

programme.title: Wonders of the Solar System
programme.desc: In this captivating series, Professor Brian Cox journeys to some of Earth’s most dramatic and remote landscapes to uncover how the fundamental laws of physics have shaped not only our planet, but the entire solar system. From towering mountains to vast deserts, he reveals the powerful forces at work in nature—and how they connect us to the wonders of the cosmos.

programme.title: Deadly Mission Shark
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on a mission to create a new generation of shark saviours, assembling a team of ordinary children to undertake a boot camp at a shark sanctuary in the Bahamas where theyll learn how to interact with sharks.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Lions, leopards and cheetahs reside in Botswanas wild Okavango Delta, where they deal with extreme conditions resulting from wildfires, floods and droughts over a period of six months as they search for food and deal with threats.

This series will encompass multiple disciplines, including dance, music, visual art and performance-based work. Each episode centres around a masterclass led by a major cultural figure working with aspiring artists at the beginning of their careers. This unique opportunity allows young creatives to learn from a world-leading artist and refine their craft.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: The Travel Shows afloat on the worlds rivers, seas and canals, and meeting the people lucky enough to live their lives in these ecosystems. From the white knuckle rapids of Sri Lanka to the serenity of Romanias wetlands, and the crazy party boats of Mexico City. Join the team as they relive their best moments from Waterways of the World.

programme.title: Rachel Khoos Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: Passionate and creative cook Rachel Khoo goes in search of new ideas in this vibrant and fascinating series. Rachel travels to some of the most beautiful foodie countries in the world, heading for cosmopolitan locations both urban and rural to get inspiration for dinner parties with her friends back home. Rachel gets under the skin of the local cuisine, showing two very different culinary influences, such as Barcelona and rural Spain, or in Italy, Naples and the Amalfi coast.

programme.title: Den iskolde vildmark
programme.desc: Det ekstreme liv i Alaska. Vintrene i Alaska er ekstremt barske med temperaturer helt ned under minus 62 grader. Følg fire familier, der er bosat i forskellige hjørner af Alaska, og deres kamp for at komme helskindet igennem den lange, ubarmhjertige vinter i området.

programme.title: Den iskolde vildmark
programme.desc: UCOS-teamet genåbner sagen om Sean Docherty, en talentfuld ung digter, hvis brændte lig blev fundet på en kendt gangsters bilkirkegård for ti år siden. Mens detektiv Standing er overbevist om, at mordet har forbindelse til Dochertys kriminelle omgangskreds, er detektiv Lane sikker på, at svaret skal findes i hans digte.

programme.title: De britiske antikskatte
programme.desc: Eksperter inviterer offentligheden til at medbringe deres antikviteter til undersøgelse. Nogle finder, at deres bric-a-brac er meget mere værd, end de nogensinde havde anet.

programme.title: Den store britiske bagedyst
programme.desc: 12 deltagere konkurrerer om at blive Storbritanniens bedste amatørbager. Undervejs møder de udfordringer, der sætter deres bageevner på prøve. Hver uge skal den person, der klarer sig dårligst, forlade programmet, og til sidst står kun vinderen tilbage!

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games Night
programme.desc: En gruppe på fire kendte ansigter konkurrerer i almen viden i en række underholdende spil. Serien indeholder alle favoritterne blandt de sjove udfordringer fra serien House of Games.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Klar til afgang! Bevæbnet med sin trofaste Bradshaws-guidebog udforsker Michael Portillo Europas smukkeste og mest forførende regioner og opdager, hvordan jernbanen har formet kontinentet.

programme.title: Kendisbagedysten
programme.desc: Kendisbagere træder ind i det berømte telt og sætter deres bagefærdigheder på prøve i forsøget på at indsamle penge til velgørenhed.

programme.title: Human
programme.desc: Palæoantropologen Ella Al-Shamahi afslører menneskehedens utrolige historie gennem 300.000 års menneskelig evolution – og hvordan historien er underligere og mere overraskende end vi nogensinde kunne forestille os.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI is a quiz show packed with quirky and surprising facts where contestants are rewarded not just for correct answers but for responses that are “quite interesting.” The show blends humor, curiosity, and clever banter, encouraging players to think outside the box. programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Airing since 1979, the British series travels the country (with occasional trips to other countries, such as Canada and Australia), bringing together in each location specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents, whether they are collectors looking to turn trash into treasure or ordinary folks hoping Grandmas old painting might now fund the kids education. Items featured on the show often have an interesting story attached to them or have some connection to that episodes venue. While some items that are brought in are worth a fortune, others are worthless.

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: In the historic town of Stratford-upon-Avon, eccentric private detectives Luella Shakespeare and Frank Hathaway join forces to crack curious cases and outsmart criminals. With Luella’s intuition and Frank’s street-smart instincts, this unconventional duo tackles mysteries filled with twists, humour, and intrigue, proving that opposites really do make the best crime-solvers.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve homebakers take part in a bake off, which will test every aspect of their baking skills as they battle it out to be crowned the Great British Bake Offs Best Amateur Baker. Each episode tests different aspects of their baking skills through a signature bake, a technical challenge, and a showstopper.

Each episode tests different aspects of their baking skills through a signature bake, a technical challenge, and a showstopper.

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games Night
programme.desc: A group of four famous faces go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge in a variety of entertaining games. The series includes all the favourite, funny challenges from the House of Games series, with the addition of new games and features. As ever, all of the games are rooted in general knowledge and can be played along at home by viewers.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: One of the most famous bibliographic references of all time, George Bradshaws Guide to the Continental Railway, serves as the guidebook for this documentary series. A total of five episodes will showcase the different European routes covered in this guide, published in 1913, which marked a turning point for British tourists during the Edwardian era. Gleaming cosmopolitan cities, alpine landscapes, warm, sparkling seas, and picturesque villages are some of the places Bradshaw describes in his book, known precisely for sparking an interest among English citizens in the exoticism of foreign travel.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for SU2C
programme.desc: Celebrities come together for a bake-off in support of a charity for cancer by whipping up a variety of delicious cakes, pastries and other baked goods.

programme.title: Human
programme.desc: Paleoanthropologist Ella Al-Shamahi reveals humanitys incredible story across 300,000 years of human evolution – and how the story is stranger and more surprising than ever imagined.

programme.title: Life in Colour
programme.desc: The natural world is full of colours that we tend to take for granted. In this series, David Attenborough travels in person from the rainforests of Costa Rica to the snowy Scottish Highlands to reveal the extraordinary ways that animals use colour.

programme.desc: Airing since 1979, the British series travels the country (with occasional trips to other countries, such as Canada and Australia), bringing together in each location specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents, whether they are collectors looking to turn trash into treasure or ordinary folks hoping Grandmas old painting might now fund the kids education. Items featured on the show often have an interesting story attached to them or have some connection to that episodes venue. While some items that are brought in are worth a fortune, others are worthless.

programme.title: George Clarkes National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke goes behind closed doors at National Trust sites, unlocking their many secrets and meeting the people that keep these architectural wonders going.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve homebakers take part in a bake off, which will test every aspect of their baking skills as they battle it out to be crowned the Great British Bake Offs Best Amateur Baker. Each episode tests different aspects of their baking skills through a signature bake, a technical challenge, and a showstopper.

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: In the historic town of Stratford-upon-Avon, eccentric private detectives Luella Shakespeare and Frank Hathaway join forces to crack curious cases and outsmart criminals. With Luella’s intuition and Frank’s street-smart instincts, this unconventional duo tackles mysteries filled with twists, humour, and intrigue, proving that opposites really do make the best crime-solvers.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI is a quiz show packed with quirky and surprising facts where contestants are rewarded not just for correct answers but for responses that are “quite interesting.” The show blends humor, curiosity, and clever banter, encouraging players to think outside the box. Its unique format creates an entertaining and unpredictable experience that celebrates knowledge in all its curious forms.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon is back in the hosts chair for the fifth series of the hit comedy panel show Would I Lie To You? And as ever, David Mitchell and Lee Mack are the lightning-quick team captains. Over the course of each show, a stellar a cast of celebrity guests reveal amazing stories about themselves, some of which are true, and some of which are not.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Hosted by the ever-witty Jimmy Carr, the stars of 8 Out of 10 Cats team up with celebrity guests to take on the iconic words and numbers game show. Packed with comedy, cleverness, and chaos, this hilarious spin on the classic quiz brings together quick-thinking, laughs, and unpredictable moments. With comedians battling brains and banter, it’s a uniquely entertaining twist that blends panel show fun with the challenge of Countdown.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: Comedian Romesh Ranganathan takes charge of the back-stabbing, big money, game show. Can the contestants create a chain of answers and avoid being the weakest link?

programme.title: Asia: Making Of
programme.desc: Med over 2500 innspillingsdager arbeider filmteam fra ulike land for å fange unike bilder.

programme.title: Livet under null
programme.desc: Serie som følger vanskelighetene som fire husstander i Alaska opplever i forskjellige hjørner av dette nådeløse territoriet mens de kjemper for å komme seg gjennom en lang, mørk, iskald vinter. Den enorme amerikanske delstaten Alaska kan skryte av noe av verdens mest dødelige vær, med temperaturer som jevnlig stuper til dødelige -80 Fahrenheit, og fryser utsatte lemmer på minutter. Likevel er det også hjemsted for noen av de tøffeste, mest motstandsdyktige og mest isolerte menneskene i verden. Livet handler om å overleve i møte med ubøyelig vær, knappe ressurser og menneskeetende rovdyr.

programme.title: Bloomberg New Economy: Thriving in an Age of Extremes
programme.desc: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.

programme.title: Businessweek Convenes
programme.desc: An exclusive roundtable with prominent Black business leaders to discuss DEI rollbacks in corporate America. With Ursula Burns, Lisa Wardell, Nicole Reboe, Chris Williams, Jacob Walthour, Jr.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Bloomberg Originals offers bold takes for curious minds on today’s biggest topics. Covering stories you haven’t seen and viewpoints you haven’t heard, you’ll discover cinematic, data-led documentaries that investigate the intersection of business and culture. Exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, Bloomberg Originals is business as you’ve never seen it.

programme.desc: To get a closer look at the businesses behind the technologies that are poised to transform global markets, the Bloomberg news team cuts through the complex jargon to get a closer look at the impossible industries shaping the future.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - Specials
programme.desc: I programmet følger vi familien Kilcher, der lever et ekstraordinært liv midt i Alaskas barske natur. De har ingen moderne bekvemmeligheder som varme eller VVS, og de overlever ved enten at dyrke deres egen mad eller gå på jagt i vildnisset. Kilcher har levet på deres jord i fire generationer, og alle familiemedlemmer ved præcis, hvordan de skal forberede sig på de lange, hårde vintre, som altid hærger her på på kanten af verden.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Huler i træerne er ikke kun for børn! Følg træhviskeren Pete Nelson der sammen med sit team er sande mestre i at bygge unikke hytter og huse til folk, der vil tættere på naturen og bo gemt helt oppe i træerne på nogle af de mest fantastiske steder.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - Specials
programme.desc: I programmet følger vi familien Kilcher, der lever et ekstraordinært liv midt i Alaskas barske natur. De har ingen moderne bekvemmeligheder som varme eller VVS, og de overlever ved enten at dyrke deres egen mad eller gå på jagt i vildnisset. Kilcher har levet på deres jord i fire generationer, og alle familiemedlemmer ved præcis, hvordan de skal forberede sig på de lange, hårde vintre, som altid hærger her på på kanten af verden.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball’s world is pretty run-of-the-mill. He’s chased around school by a T-Rex. He has a friend named Anton who’s a piece of toast. He’s got a crush on Penny, a peanut with antlers. His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Bunnicula
programme.desc: Bunnicula is an animated comedy series based on the bestselling childrens book of the same name. The series features the paranormal comedy adventures of Bunnicula the vampire rabbit, Chester the paranoid cat, and Harold the loyal family dog. Together, our heroes protect their owner Mina and the city of New Orleans from spooky supernatural creatures… including Bunnicula himself!

programme.desc: From Warner Bros. Animation, these teen titans are on the go! Right after they make a sandwich or play some video games. Wait, theres laundry to do? ("Not it!") programme.title: Uncle Grandpa
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa is everyone on Earths magical uncle AND grandpa, who travels around helping people and changing their lives forever. He goes on adventures and solves problems with the help of his friends, Mr. Gus, Pizza Steve, Giant Realistic Flying Tiger and Belly Bag. Together, they ride in The RV, Uncle Grandpas magical home on wheels that can drive on its own and contains an endless playhouse of strange and crazy rooms.

programme.title: Uncle Grandpa

He goes on adventures and solves problems with the help of his friends, Mr. Gus, Pizza Steve, Giant Realistic Flying Tiger and Belly Bag. Together, they ride in The RV, Uncle Grandpas magical home on wheels that can drive on its own and contains an endless playhouse of strange and crazy rooms.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. Theyre out to have the most fun possible and they sure do find it exploring the Land of Ooo! Whether its saving Princess Bubblegum, battling zombie candy, taunting the Ice King or rocking out with Marceline the Vampire Queen, with Finn and Jake its always ADVENTURE TIME!

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: From Warner Bros. Animation, these teen titans are on the go! Right after they make a sandwich or play some video games. Wait, theres laundry to do? ("Not it!") After that, theyll definitely go fight some crime. Maybe. Dont miss the return of Robin, Starfire, Raven, Beast Boy and Cyborg - teen super heroes who are totally unsupervised!.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: A clever little boy from a suburban town in Maryland loves exploring and playing at his neighbourhood creek, where he convinces his two best friends to join him on various journeys that turn their normal afternoons into magical adventures.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: A clever little boy from a suburban town in Maryland loves exploring and playing at his neighbourhood creek, where he convinces his two best friends to join him on various journeys that turn their normal afternoons into magical adventures.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: To combat an evil form of Spinjitzu, “Shatterspin,” the Ninja seek out hermit Dragon Masters to train them in a counter-technique known as Rising Dragon. Guided by Lloyd’s visions, they find their confidence and friendships tested. Lord Ras wants to free ancient Elemental Masters known as the Forbidden Five during the coming Blood Moon but needs Cole’s Finder, Bonzle, to complete the ritual.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai – a sarcastic blue jay, and Rigby – a somewhat responsible raccoon, are best friends. They even work together at a park owned by Pops, a big lollipop-headed guy. Which seems normal enough. They’ve got a cranky gumball machine for a boss and they work alongside a Zen-like yeti named Skips. Yep. Everything is as regular as can be.

programme.title: Uncle Grandpa
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa is everyone on Earths magical uncle AND grandpa, who travels around helping people and changing their lives forever. He goes on adventures and solves problems with the help of his friends, Mr. Gus, Pizza Steve, Giant Realistic Flying Tiger and Belly Bag. Together, they ride in The RV, Uncle Grandpas magical home on wheels that can drive on its own and contains an endless playhouse of strange and crazy rooms.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. Theyre out to have the most fun possible and they sure do find it exploring the Land of Ooo! Whether its saving Princess Bubblegum, battling zombie candy, taunting the Ice King or rocking out with Marceline the Vampire Queen, with Finn and Jake its always ADVENTURE TIME!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Jade Armor

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Tre unge kvinner fra Beverly Hills: Sam, Clover og Alex lever som hemmelige agenter for Verdensorganisasjonen for Menneskebeskyttelse (WOOHP).

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: Den tapre prins Ivandoes heroiske ferd" er fortellingen om et ungt rådyr på sitt livs største eventyr. Ivandoe er skogens unge prins. En dag vil han etterfølge sin far og herske som konge...

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America, and Chinas top sports leagues.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. Regular updates from Beijing and Washington D.C. keep viewers up-to-date with all the worlds top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. Regular updates from Beijing and Washington D.C. keep viewers up-to-date with all the worlds top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. Regular updates from Beijing and Washington D.C. keep viewers up-to-date with all the worlds top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTNs Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the regions top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Leaders Talk

programme.desc: CGTNs brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the worlds most powerful laser and the worlds smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: Managing Asia is the Asia Pacific regions ground-breaking interview programme featuring CEOs, entrepreneurs and other business leaders.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains’ is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Converge
programme.desc: CNBC’s “CONVERGE” explores the intersection between innovation, investment, leadership, and sustainability across business, sports, and entertainment.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich. Their complex scams leave victims lives in shambles. Each episode is a deep dive into the minds and actions of heartless crooks who live lives most people can only dream of.

programme.title: Nord bei Nordwest
programme.desc: Der ehemalige Hamburger Polizist Hauke Jacobs mochte im Ostsee-Stadtchen Schwanitz als Tierarzt neu anfangen. Doch immer wieder kommen ihm mysteriose Verbrechen dazwischen.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Aktuelle Nachrichten aus Deutschland, Europa und der Welt in der Tagesschau mit Gebardensprache.

programme.title: Zielfahnder - Kalte Sonne
programme.desc: Das Zielfahnder-Duo Ulrike C. Tscharre und Hanno Koffler jagt in seinem vierten Einsatz eine besonders skrupellose Verbrecherin bis nach Malta: Die von Susanne Wuest mit eiskalter Diabolik verkorperte Menschenhandlerin ist der Kopf eines international operierenden Prostituiertenrings. Das Drehbuch von Mia Maariel Meyer, zuletzt als Regisseurin des Bahnen“ im Kino erfolgreich, zeigt ein zynisches Missbrauchssystem, das seine Opfer zur Ware degradiert, sexueller Gewalt aussetzt und ihre Seelen zerstort.

programme.title: Wolfsland
programme.desc: Die Gorlitzer Krimireihe mit Kriminalhauptkommissarin Viola Delbruck und Kriminalhauptkommissar Burkhard "Butsch" Schulz.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Aktuelle Nachrichten aus Deutschland, Europa und der Welt in der Tagesschau mit Gebardensprache.

programme.title: Deutschlandbilder
programme.desc: Deutsche Landschaften, Stadte, Inseln: Begleiten Sie uns zu den schonsten Platzen Deutschlands. Die Sendung zeigt beeindruckende Natur, lebendige Metropolen und idyllische Regionen und ladt dazu ein, Bekanntes neu zu entdecken.

programme.title: TickTack Zeitreise mit Lisa and Lena
programme.desc: Langeweile und endlose Ausfuhrungen wie im Geschichtsunterricht? Fehlanzeige! Bei "TickTack Zeitreise mit Lisa and Lena" nehmen die beiden euch mit auf eine temporeiche, spannende und oft sehr lustige Entdeckungsreise in die Vergangenheit - die Themen reichen von Fotografie uber Gleichberechtigung bis hin zu Mode, Raumfahrt oder Operationen.

programme.title: Shaun das Schaf
programme.desc: Shaun, Bitzer und der Rest der Clique stellen auf der Mossy Bottom Farm allerlei tierischen Unfug an. Der Frieden im traumhaften Tal verwandelt sich in Chaos auf der wilden Weide, sobald der schelmische Shaun seine Herde zu diversem Blodsinn anstiftet und Hutehund Bitzer an der Nase herumfuhrt – naturlich immer nur, wenn der Farmer gerade wegschaut.

programme.title: Tigerenten Club
programme.desc: Zwei Schulklassen treten jeweils als Tigerenten- und Froscheteam zusammen mit ihren Lehrern in Spielen gegeneinander an. Das Verliererteam schickt seinen Lehrer am Ende des Spiels baden, die Gewinnerklasse erhalt auSSerdem Sachpreise.

programme.title: MausBlick
programme.desc: Mit dieser Frage von Max und Paul beschaftigt sich Theresa im aktuellen MausBlick.

programme.title: Der Club der hasslichen Kinder
programme.desc: Der junge Paul wird von seiner Schule auf einen "Ausflug“ geschickt. Als er entdeckt, dass alle "hasslichen“ Kinder weggesperrt werden sollen, flieht er, denn Paul hat Segelohren. Seine Mitschulerin Sara versteckt ihn. Im Untergrund grunden sie uber die sozialen Medien den "Club der hasslichen Kinder“ mit Paul als Anfuhrer. Wie ein Lauffeuer verbreitet sich ihre Aktion und eine Widerstandsbewegung gegen die Diskriminierung von "Hasslichen“ entsteht. Demonstrationen der Kinder werden brutal niedergeschlagen. Die TV-Nachrichten verbreiten Fake News uber die Kinder und bezeichnen Paul als Terroristen. Pauls Vater, der als Journalist arbeitet, schafft es schlieSSlich, auch Position zu beziehen und sich der Revolution anzuschlieSSen. Er wird interniert. Gemeinsam mit Sara und Kai gelingt es Paul, eine geheime Internet-Reportage uber die Zustande im "Auffrischcamp“ zu machen.

programme.title: Racko - Ein Hund fur alle Falle
programme.desc: Im Mittelpunkt der Serie RACKO - Ein Hund fur alle Falle steht der 12-jahrige Flori, der von seinem GroSSvater einen Bauernhof erbt.

programme.title: Racko - Ein Hund fur alle Falle
programme.desc: Florian Wiesner erbt den Bauernhof seines GroSSvaters in Bayern. Er zieht mit seiner Mutter von Leipzig aufs Land. Neben dem Hof hat Florian auch den treuen Hund seines GroSSvaters, Racko, geerbt, der ihm das Leben in der ungewohnten Umgebung etwas erleichtert.

programme.title: Die Sendung mit der Maus
programme.desc: Die nach dem „Sandmannchen“ zweitalteste Kindersendung Deutschlands gehort seit 1971 zum festen Sonntagvormittagsritual in bundesrepublikanischen Wohnstuben. Nicht nur Kinder, sondern auch viele Erwachsene sitzen jede Woche vorm Fernseher, wenn die schlaue orangefarbene Maus, ihr blauer Elefanten-Kumpel und die gelbe Ente mit kurzen witzigen Zeichentrick-Clips zwischen den „Lach- und Sachgeschichten“ uberleiten. Jede Folge der halbstundigen Sendung beginnt in der Regel mit einem kurzen Trickfilm. Dem folgt ein Beitrag, in dem einer typischen kindlichen Frage nachgegangen wird, welche Eltern oft nicht kindgerecht erklaren konnen. Mit einfachen Worten und leicht verstandlichen, oft verbluffend kreativen Versuchsanordnungen erklaren „Maus“-Miterfinder Armin Maiwald und seine Kollegen Christoph Biemann und Ralph Caspers, wie der Strom in die Steckdose kommt, die Locher in den Kase oder die Streifen in die Zahnpasta. Im Anschluss folgen meist noch von einem Trickfilm oder einer Animation begleitete Lieder oder eine weitere kurzere Sachgeschichte und schlieSSlich noch ein abschlieSSender (Puppen-)Trickfilm mit dem Seemannsgarn-spinnenden „Kapt’n Blaubar“ oder den Knetfiguren um „Shaun das Schaf“.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Aktuelle Nachrichten aus Deutschland, Europa und der Welt in der Tagesschau mit Gebardensprache.

programme.title: Prinzessin Maleen
programme.desc: Prinzessin Maleen liebt den wenig standesgemaSSen Landgrafen Konrad. Ihr Vater aber hat andere Plane: Furst Theodor will zunachst einen Feldzug erfolgreich bestehen, zu dem ihn der verschlagene Baron Raimund getrieben hat. Danach soll Maleen Raimund ehelichen. Maleen jedoch steht zu Konrad. Als sie uneinsichtig bleibt, lasst der Furst sie in einen Turm sperren.

programme.title: Von einem, der auszog, das Furchten zu lernen
programme.desc: Topfersohn Michel hat ein Problem: Er kann sich einfach nicht furchten, nicht mal ein kleines bisschen. Als auch der Kuster daran scheitert, Michel das Furchten beizubringen, zieht Michel kurz entschlossen in die Welt hinaus. Prinzessin Elisabeth lebt mit ihrem Vater, dem Konig, in einer Zeltstadt, weil es im Schloss zu sehr spukt. Der Konig verspricht demjenigen, der dem Spuk im Schloss ein Ende bereitet, seine Tochter zur Frau. Bislang sind alle Anwarter gescheitert. Doch da gibt es ja Michel, der sich vor gar nichts furchtet.

programme.title: Tagesschau

programme.title: Presseclub
programme.desc: Im ARD-Presseclub diskutieren Journalistinnen und Journalisten aus dem In- und Ausland aktuelle politische Ereignisse und Entwicklungen. Im Dialog entsteht ein Wettstreit der Meinungen und Interpretationen aktueller politischer Vorgange. Durch die Sendungen fuhren im Wechsel Volker Herres, Jorg Schonenborn und Sonia Seymour Mikich. Im anschlieSSenden "Presseclub nachgefragt" konnen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauer uber die WDR 5 Hotline mit den Beteiligten der Sendung weiterdiskutieren und Fragen stellen.

programme.title: Europamagazin
programme.desc: SWR und WDR prasentieren das Europamagazin im Ersten im wochentlichen Wechsel das Neueste von der EU in Brussel und aus unseren Nachbarlandern: Sonntagmittag, gleich nach dem Presseclub.

programme.title: ARD Wissen

programme.title: Hotel Heidelberg
programme.desc: Im idyllisch gelegenen „Hotel Heidelberg“ muss sich Junior-Chefin Annette Kramer nicht nur mit den wachsenden Anspruchen der Hotelgaste auseinandersetzen, sondern als alleinerziehende Mutter auch mit den Problemen ihres pubertierenden Sohnes Jeremy. Und auch die charismatische Hotelgrunderin Hermine Kramer macht ihrer Tochter durch ihr standiges Einmischen in die Geschafte das Leben nicht gerade leichter. Immerhin ist da noch Annettes Therapeut Ingolf, der sich machtig ins Zeug legt, um sie vor groSSeren Absturzen zu bewahren.

programme.title: Sportschau
programme.desc: Das Sportmagazin berichtet an 365 Tagen im Jahr zu aktuellen Nachrichten-Themen aus Deutschland, Europa und der Welt. Ob FuSSball-Bundesliga, Handball, Laufen, Tennis, Radsport, Eishockey, Boxen oder Motorsport - in dieser Sendung erfahren die Zuschauer daheim, wer wo wann was gewonnen hat und erhalten eine Übersicht zu allen News-Themen aus der Sportwelt, den Sportarten, Ligen und Vereinen.

programme.title: Bericht aus Berlin

programme.title: Sportschau
programme.desc: Das Sportmagazin berichtet an 365 Tagen im Jahr zu aktuellen Nachrichten-Themen aus Deutschland, Europa und der Welt. programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tagesschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen. Das Flaggschiff unter den deutschen Nachrichtensendungen ist gleichzeitig die "dienstalteste" noch bestehende Sendung im deutschen Fernsehen. In bis zu 20 am Tag produzierten Sendungen wird die Komplexitat des Weltgeschehens verstandlich erklart und in komprimierter Form uber aktuelle politische, wirtschaftliche, soziale, kulturelle, sportliche und sonstige Ereignisse berichtet.

programme.title: Tatort
programme.desc: Verschiedene Ermittlerteams aus unterschiedlichen deutschen, osterreichischen und Schweizer Stadten losen Kriminalfalle – von Koln uber Hamburg, Munchen und Berlin bis hin zu Wien und Zurich. Jeder Tatort-Krimi ist ein in sich abgeschlossener Film. Was die Serie so einzigartig macht, ist ihre gesellschaftliche Relevanz: Die Falle greifen regelmaSSig aktuelle soziale, politische und moralische Themen auf – von Korruption und Machtmissbrauch bis hin zu Migration, Familiendramen und Wirtschaftskriminalitat. Der Tatort ein echtes Fernsehereignis und ein fester Bestandteil der deutschen Popularkultur - nicht selten verfolgen mehrere Millionen Zuschauer gleichzeitig denselben Fall.

programme.title: Caren Miosga
programme.desc: "Caren Miosga" diskutiert mit Personlichkeiten aus Politik, Wirtschaft, Kultur und Gesellschaft das aktuell relevanteste Thema der Woche. Dabei sollen unterschiedliche Standpunkte und Sichtweisen auf ein Problem sowie die dahinterstehenden politischen Prozesse deutlich werden. Ziel ist es, Mehrwert und Erkenntnisgewinn fur Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauer zu generieren und Gesprachswert fur die kommende Woche zu schaffen.

programme.title: Tagesthemen
programme.desc: Die tagesthemen gehoren zu den wichtigsten Nachrichtensendungen im deutschen Fernsehen und bieten taglich eine vertiefende Einordnung aktueller Ereignisse aus Politik, Wirtschaft, Gesellschaft und Kultur. Im Gegensatz zu kurzeren Nachrichtenformaten stehen hier Hintergrundberichte, Analysen und Interviews im Mittelpunkt. Korrespondent:innen aus aller Welt liefern zusatzliche Perspektiven, wahrend Expert:innen komplexe Entwicklungen verstandlich erklaren. Die Sendung richtet sich an ein breites Publikum, das nicht nur informiert werden mochte, sondern auch Zusammenhange besser verstehen will.

programme.title: ttt - titel thesen temperamente
programme.desc: So spannend ist Kultur: "ttt" berichtet uber aktuelle Ausstellungen, neue Musik, aufregende Aktionen, groSSe und kleine Stars sowie Trends der internationalen Kultur-Szene.

programme.title: Parasite
programme.desc: Die mittellose Familie Kim sucht in Seoul den schnellen Weg nach oben und schleicht sich mit einigem Geschick und Rucksichtslosigkeit in das Leben der wohlhabenden Parks ein. Bitterbose, mehrfach oscargekronte Gesellschaftssatire von Bong Joon-ho («Snowpiercer»).

programme.title: WaPo Berlin
programme.desc: Kriminalhauptkommissarin Jasmin Sayed leitet das frisch ins Leben gerufene Pilotprojekt „Wasserkriminaldezernat Eins der Wasserschutzpolizei Berlin“, kurz WaPo Berlin. Seit 30 Jahren lebt Jasmin in Deutschland und weiSS nur zu genau, dass Rechtssicherheit keine Selbstverstandlichkeit ist. Das Gesetz zu verteidigen, treibt sie an.

programme.title: Wer weiSS denn sowas?
programme.desc: Jeweils von einem prominenten Gast unterstutzt, stellen sich die Teamkapitane Bernhard Hoëcker und Wotan Wilke Mohring (bis 2025: Elton) montags bis freitags den Fragen von Moderator Kai Pflaume. Es gilt, „spannende und skurrile Fragen aus Wissenschaft, Tierwelt und dem taglichen Leben zu beantworten“, um moglichst viel Geld zu erspielen. Die Zuschauer entscheiden sich zu Beginn der Show, ob sie sich auf die Seite von Bernhard Hoëcker oder Wotan Wilke Mohring schlagen. Beide Teams spielen um Bares fur ihre Unterstutzer und am Ende wird der Gewinn unter den Anhangern des Siegerteams aufgeteilt.Auf einer groSSen, interaktiven Spielewand mit zwolf Kategorien verbergen sich Fragen wie: „Was ist das Besondere an einem finnischen Reisepass?“, „Was passiert, wenn man Milch mit Cola mischt?“ oder „Warum konnen Manner Frauen laut einer wissenschaftlichen Studie nicht gut zuhoren?“. Die Auflosungen werden anschlieSSend in Form von Einspielfilmen prasentiert, aber auch Kai Pflaume greift hin und wieder selbst in den Experimentierkasten.

programme.desc: Bei Sturm der Liebe dreht sich alles um turbulente, spannende, witzige und vor allem romantische Geschichten rund um Freundschaft, Liebe und Familie im bayerischen Luxushotel „Furstenhof“. Im Mittelpunkt stehen wechselnde Liebespaare, deren Beziehungen von Intrigen, Missverstandnissen und groSSen Gefuhlen gepragt sind. Gleichzeitig sorgen familiare Konflikte, uberraschende Wendungen und humorvolle Momente fur abwechslungsreiche Unterhaltung im Alltag des Hotels.

In den ersten 5 Staffeln ermittelt Arthur Brauss, ab Staffel 6 ubernimmt Jan Fedder den Dienst auf dem 14. Revier der Hamburger Polizei.

programme.desc: Das informative Kurzformat "Wissen vor acht – Zukunft" will auf unterhaltsame Weise Wissen vermitteln und neugierig machen. Jeweils montags und dienstags um 19:45 Uhr moderiert Anja Reschke die Sendung.

programme.desc: Malta’s hand-painted buses, each one unique, once ferried locals and tourists alike. Now few remain, lovingly restored by specialist coachbuilders. We also ride with police on speed patrol and test the VinFast VF 6.

programme.title: Scrappers
programme.desc: Scrappers is the real-life comedy of three Brooklyn crews who hunt down scrap metal for money. Every day’s a battle for a buck, and every job has minor snags that turn into major complications.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates has decided its time to reallyexplore the dark side of our world. To this end, Gates has put together a team to undertake investigations delving into realms beyond the unknown. Hes picked Michelle Tate and Phil Torres to mount unprecedented expeditions into the unexplained and perhaps ...unexplainable.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Master of mystery Josh Gates explores a treasure trove of mind-bending mysteries, carefully curated during his two decades of travelling the globe. Josh travels through history on a search to uncover new evidence and answers to the worlds most captivating unexplained mysteries, and true stories that defy explanation, offering stunning revelations and surprising new insights.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard is one of the UKs top decorative antique dealers. Always on the hunt for that elusive gem, Drew travels the length and breadth of the country in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard of forgotten antiques and dusty furniture, the happier Drew is!

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: This trip is no joyful nudist holiday, and the protagonists of this documentary series simply dont have time to feel ashamed about their lack of clothing. They have much bigger problems to contend with. This is a matter of sheer survival! Randomly paired couples who have never met before must survive 21 days in the most inhospitable regions of the world – without equipment or food supplies. Due to the dangers they face on these survival trips, the lack of clothing quickly becomes a minor issue. On the Yucatán Peninsula, in the jungles of Nicaragua, and in the Smoky Mountains, entirely different things take priority. Here, the naked couples not only have to find food and clean drinking water – they also have to contend with wild animals: aggressive big cats, poisonous spiders, and hungry bears make life difficult for the adventurers.

programme.title: High Speed Chase
programme.desc: An all-star team of experts come together to solve the countys cold cases, driven only by the pursuit of justice and the desire to put murderers behind bars.

Og hvilke hemmeligheder ligger gemt under mayaernes templer i Chichen Itza? Ved hjælp af banebrydende teknologi, ser denne serie nærmere på disse antikke og ikoniske vidundere, for at afsløre deres skjulte kamre og hvælvinger, og trækker dem fra hinanden - sten for sten.

programme.desc: Følg chaufførerne, når de skal transportere deres værdifulde last over den australske ødemark så hurtigt som muligt, mens de sikrer sig, at de kommer frem og tilbage i et stykke. Mød blandt andet chaufførlegenden Steve Grahame, der fragter livsvigtigt generatorudstyr til en værdi af 3 mio. dollar til et øde samfund i den nordvestlige del af Australien i Kalumburu.

programme.title: Dino Hunters
programme.desc: Ankylosaurus, Triceratops, or Velociraptor: Where cattle graze today, dinosaurs ruled the earth until 65 million years ago. Now, the remains of these prehistoric giants lie buried in sedimentary rock, waiting to be unearthed. Dino hunters like Clayton Phipps, Jared Hudson, and Mike Harris are taking on the task. Ranchers and cowboys want to turn these prehistoric treasures into cash! The fossil discoveries are also important for science. Using 3D scanners and high-tech computer models, experts are bringing the hidden world of dinosaurs back to life.

programme.desc: Ever wondered how everyday items are made? More common items are put under the microscope to find out.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: How the Universe Works is a documentary science TV series, answering all questions about jaw dropping structure of Universe. Get the answers to all questions like if there are any habitable planets in our Galaxy, what is Big Bang theory in details, how a black hole is born, explore a whole range of fascinating cosmos phenomena.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: How the Universe Works is a documentary science TV series, answering all questions about jaw dropping structure of Universe. Get the answers to all questions like if there are any habitable planets in our Galaxy, what is Big Bang theory in details, how a black hole is born, explore a whole range of fascinating cosmos phenomena.

programme.title: NASAs Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Since the launch of the manned space program over 50 years ago, cameras aboard NASA spacecrafts have captured hundreds of objects, the nature of which cannot properly be explained. NASA’S UNEXPLAINED FILES expands on some of the strangest unexplained happenings on record – all of which were caught on camera.

programme.title: Coopers Treasure
programme.desc: Darrell Miklos, a historical shipwreck recovery expert with a passion for finding treasure, continues an astronauts mission to find Columbus sunken fleet and billions of pounds of treasure in the South Caribbean.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Hamster og Grete

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Max og Mule
programme.desc: Fedtmule er alenefar og flytter med sin søn, Max, ind i huset ved siden af sin gamle skolekammerat Sorteper. Sortepers søn, Per Junior, og Max bliver bedste venner og gør næsten alting sammen.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Anders narrer Chip og Chap til at skovle sne, men slaget vender.

programme.title: Lilo and Stitch: Serien
programme.desc: Hvis Stitch var Dr. Jumbas elskede Experiment 626, hvad skete der så med den anden 625? Jumbas resterende eksperiment er landet over hele Hawaii i dehydrerede bælg. De aktiveres, når de kommer i vandet, og ligesom Stitch har hvert eksperiment sine egne talenter for ødelæggelse og komedie. Lilo og Stitchs mission er at fange Stitchs "fætre", inden de ender i hænderne på den onde Jacques von Hamsterviel og hans tjener Gantu, vende eksperimenterne fra ondskab til godt til ondt og finde steder, hvor de kan høre til og bidrage til samfundet.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Mickey forsøger at gøre Minnies have ryddelig til trods for en livlig hvirvelvind.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner (kortfilm)
programme.desc: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner samarbejder for at bekæmpe skurke og redde folk i problemer. Mød heltene, som hjælper Spidey med at redde dagen!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: Superkillingerne - Bitten, Rosa, Kvik og Mester - er tilbage, og de er superenergiske! Teamet er på en mission for at rette op på uret og gøre verden til et venligere og mere potetastisk sted.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.desc: Superkillingerne - Bitten, Rosa, Kvik og Mester - er tilbage, og de er superenergiske! Teamet er på en mission for at rette op på uret og gøre verden til et venligere og mere potetastisk sted.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: På eventyr med Disneys feer
programme.desc: Klokkeblomst opdager en sølvklingende klokke og bruger lidt tid på at udforske den. Hun laver forskellige sjove ansigter ved at se sit spejlbillede i klokkens skinnende overflade. Så sidder Klokkeblomst ved et uheld fast inde i klokken.

programme.title: På eventyr med Disneys feer
programme.desc: Klokkeblomst finder en menneskelig peberbøsse og eksperimenterer med den.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas Flynn and his resourceful stepbrother, Ferb Fletcher, happily set out to conquer boredom and make every day of their 104-day summer vacation count. Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Goof Troop
programme.desc: Goofy is a single father raising his son, Max in Spoonerville. As it happens, Goofy and Max end up moving in next door to Goofys high school friend: Pete, a used car salesman and owner of Honest Petes Used Cars; Petes wife Peg, a real estate agent; and their two children, son P.J. (Pete Jr.) and younger daughter Pistol. Petes son PJ and Max become best friends practically doing everything together.

programme.title: Disneys Have a Laugh!
programme.desc: Join Donald, Mickey, Pluto and friends for classic animated adventures

programme.title: Lilo and Stitch: The Series
programme.desc: If Stitch was Dr. Jumba’s beloved Experiment 626, what happened to the other 625? Jumba’s remaining experiments have landed all over Hawaii in the form of dehydrated pods. The experiments become activated when submerged in water and, much like Stitch, each experiment has its own specific talents for destruction...and comedy. Lilo and Stitch’s mission is to catch Stitch’s "cousins" before they fall into the clutches of the evil Dr. Jacques von Hamsterviel and his henchman Gantu, turn the experiments’ natures from bad to good, and find places where each can belong and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

While they live normal lives, they also transform into the superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir to defend Paris from any threat Hawk Moth sends their way, including a villain whose drawings come to life, a monster that feeds on fear, and a dark knight with plans to rule Paris!

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: Sweet and cuddly kittens solve big problems and put an end to trouble by turning into the SuperKitties, a group of heroes who use their special abilities for good to help their neighbors, stop the bad guys and save the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse+
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse and his closest friends welcome back all of the rest of his young friends to his clubhouse to invite them all on some new adventures which are filled with music, laughter and new surprises in every imaginable room.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey is an inexhaustible six year-old Blue Heeler dog, who loves to play and turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures, developing her imagination as well as her mental, physical and emotional resilience.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends

If Spidey finds himself in a sticky situation that needs even more super-hero power, rest assured that an Avenger pal will race in to help out.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!
